design_fidelity.note: Grey-beige #EDEAE7 sourced from svenroth.ai's own --light-beige-background; contrast targets checked against WCAG AA (4.5:1 text) and 1.4.11 (3:1 control boundary).

behaviors.behavior: AC1 form sheet uses the grey-beige --surface-form, not the yellow --beige
behaviors.evidence: ModalShell.test.tsx 'renders the grey-beige form surface…' PASSED + qa-form-newtask.png
ModalShell.test.tsx (footer hint --body) + FieldLabel/palette/ParamSections token sweep; qa screenshots

behaviors.behavior: AC4 More options: visible frame + darker tone persistently when expanded, hover steps darker
behaviors.evidence: MoreOptionsDisclosure.test.tsx 'carries the darker tone persistently when expanded…' PASSED + qa-form-hover-moreoptions.png

behaviors.behavior: AC5 every task form variant (incl. Plain/pure-Claude) inherits AC1-AC4
behaviors.evidence: all five bodies render through ModalShell + SimpleFields (NewPlainModal imports Title/DescriptionFieldFragment); NewIssueModal suite 97 tests PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC6 title-bar buttons render the Launch/Resume teal rgb(14,122,107)
behaviors.evidence: QA assertion: computed backgroundColor of board/projects/ships-log/modal-Launch all equal rgb(14,122,107)

behaviors.behavior: AC7 buttons share height 36px + right edge; label may widen only
behaviors.evidence: QA assertion: unique heights=[36], unique right edges=[1233]

behaviors.behavior: AC8 buttons share a baseline regardless of a page subtitle
behaviors.evidence: QA assertion: max-min y <= 2 (28/28/29) after .page-head .inner min-height:92px
